hook_options: FKM rubber. Built for Royal Pop.

beats.line: The Cradle Adapter V1 matches the Royal Pop’s case.

caption_options.label: A
caption_options.caption:
40.35mm. 0.7mm. Exact fit for the Royal Pop.

• 40.35mm inner socket (precise case fit)
• 0.7mm retaining lip (secure, scratch-free)
• FKM rubber (durable, premium feel)
• 22mm lug width (standard strap compatibility)
• Five colourways: Monochrome, Arctic Blue, Cobalt Orange, Green Eight, Otto Rosso

Pre-Order Now. First batch only.

#PopWristStudio #RoyalPop #WatchAdapter #PrecisionEngineering

Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Swatch Group Ltd or Audemars Piguet.

caption_options.label: B
caption_options.caption:
Your Royal Pop wasn’t made for the wrist. Until now.

The Cradle Adapter V1 is engineered for one watch: the Royal Pop. Exact 40.35mm socket, 0.7mm retaining lip, and FKM rubber for durability and premium feel. Five colourways. One perfect fit.

Pre-Order Now. First batch only.

#PopWristStudio #WatchAccessories #EngineeredForPrecision

Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Swatch Group Ltd or Audemars Piguet.

legal_safety_notes: Disclaimer included in caption as per website truth.
No affiliation implied with Swatch or AP.
pieces.handoff_note_for_qa: Recommended caption A for its direct spec-focused approach, aligning with the engineering-first lead angle. Line 1 is concise and stands alone, while bullet points improve readability for technical details.

website_truth.verified_disclaimer: Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Swatch Group Ltd or Audemars Piguet.

_qa_approved_elements: Reel script beats (timing, purpose, and content align with creative direction)
Hook options and recommended hook (spec-first, concise, and aligned with known winners)
On-screen text array (covers all must-show elements)
Caption A (direct, spec-focused, and legally compliant)
Caption B (alternative narrative with emotional hook, also compliant)
Recommended caption A (justified by handoff note)
CTA wording (exact match to website truth)
Spec accuracy (all specs match website truth)
pieces._qa_visual_instruction: Ensure macro shots of the 40.35mm socket, 0.7mm retaining lip, and FKM rubber texture are captured with high contrast against a neutral background. Include a satisfying click-in shot of the Royal Pop into the adapter. Montage of the five colourways should be quick (1–2s total).
